name: Choco-Nut Tarts
recipeInstructions:
Filling: In saucepan combine butter and chocolate and stir over low heat until melted. Pour mixture into a bowl and let cool for 5 minutes. Using an electric mixer, beat eggs into the chocolate mixture. Add sugar, corn syrup, and vanilla, blending until smooth. Fold in chopped walnuts.
To assemble: Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Roll out dough on a floured board to a thickness of 1/8 inch. Cut circles from the dough using 2 1/2-inch tartlet pans (cutting slightly larger than the pans). Place dough into the pans and press firmly around the edges. Fill each pan about 2/3 full with the filling mixture. Transfer the assembled tarts to a baking sheet to catch any spills.
Topping: In a chilled bowl, beat cream, sugar, and almond extract until stiff peaks form without overbeating. Pipe decorative toppings onto each tartlet using a pastry bag fitted with a star tip.
